outputs.description: The unique ID of the HostChangeLog in the eyeInspect CC. ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.timestamp Timestamp in ISO format of when the host change was detected.
outputs.name: ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.id

outputs.description: An identifier of the type of change detected. ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.event_type_name A more human readable representation of the type of change detected.
outputs.name: ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.event_type_id

outputs.description: A more general type of the change detected. ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.host_id The unique ID of the host in the eyeInspect CC database in which the change was detected.
outputs.name: ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.event_category

outputs.description: The source of information for the detected change. ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.sensor_id In case the detected change was reported from a sensor, the unique ID in the eyeInspect CC database of the sensor reporting the information.
outputs.name: ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.information_source

outputs.description: In case the detected change was reported from a sensor, the unique ID in the eyeInspect CC database of the sensor reporting the information. ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.username In case the detected change was reported from a eyeInspect user, the username of the user reporting the information.
outputs.name: ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.sensor_id

outputs.description: The old value of the host property. ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.new_value The new value of the host property.
outputs.name: ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.old_value

outputs.description: The IP address, or nested address (in case of a nested device) of the host. ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.host_vlan The VLAN ID of the host (only present if the process_vlan_tags option is enabled in the sensor).
outputs.name: ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.host_address

outputs.description: The main name of the host. ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.host_ip_reuse_domain_id The unique ID of the IP Reuse Domain the host is in.
outputs.name: ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.host_name

outputs.description: The MAC addresses associated to the host.
outputs.name: ForescoutEyeInspect.HostChangeLog.host_mac_addresses
